stemHtml: What is the effect of a forward CG on the time to reach cruising altitude?

options.a: The CG position has no impact on the Rate of Climb.
options.b: A forward CG allows the selection of a higher cruising altitude, therefore increases the time to reach cruising altitude.
options.c: A forward CG increases the maximum Rate of Climb and decreases the time to reach cruising altitude.
options.d: A forward CG decreases the maximum Rate of Climb and increases the time to reach cruising altitude.
